sglang.title: Fix SWA double-free in disagg decode with MTP speculation

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Clear stale SWA mappings on non-tail full indices in alloc_extend_swa_tail

Almost the same error  with Deepseek-OCR/OCR2

sglang.title: Add MiniCPM5 tool call parser for XML-style function calls
sglang.author: zhangtao2-1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds native tool-call parsing support for MiniCPM5 models in SGLang. MiniCPM5 uses an XML-style function-call format (V3 schema) that differs from JSON-based parsers used by other models.
Without a dedicated detector, SGLang cannot correctly extract tool calls from model output during stream

Motivation
Fix visual corruption in Wan VAE decoding when Conv3d weights are stored in channels_last_3d memory format.
This PR makes Wan causal Conv3d inputs match the memory format of the Conv3d weights before running the convolution, and restores the output back to contiguous format afterward to k

function wrapper from tools for Mistral-style templates. If the a

Adds a top-level kv_events field to the /server_info HTTP response so KV-aware routers can discover each worker's KV-event publisher endpoint via worker introspection instead of operator-side port coordination. The value is a structured descriptor (or null when publishing is disabled / misco

sglang.title: FutureMap: debug-assert that gather sees a stashed value
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Invariant
Per slot in FutureMap.output_tokens_buf, the only valid trace is WRWRWR... — every write has exactly one consuming read before the next write. WWRR (two writes without an intermediate read, then two reads) silently drops the first write's value and was tolerated by previous code.
Check

In

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Clear P0 mm sender cache on sleep/pause to fix mm_hash desync
vllm.author: wasnertobias
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #42995.
/sleep?level>=1 and /pause?clear_cache=true go through EngineCore on the engine side, which only clears the P1 multimodal receiver cache via pause_scheduler -> _reset_caches -> reset_mm_cache. The P0 sender cache (MultiModalProcessorSenderCache) lives in the API server process

vllm.title: [EPLB] Change default EPLB communicator
vllm.author: ilmarkov
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Replace torch_nccl as the default EPLB communicator for synchronous mode. Batched isend/irecv with the NCCL backend hangs under high load (many ops, large tensors) — see pytorch/pytorch#174288.
The new default prefers nixl when the package is installed, and falls back to torch_gloo otherwise

Fix an intermittent ROCm wheel-build race in CI (AMD: :docker: build image) introduced by #42663. Four parallel hipify${NAME} cmake targets share ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/csrc; when their shutil.copytree + matched_files_iter calls overlap, one process reads a .cu mid-copy, reports [skippe

Purpose
Introduce a UtilityCallId newtype for engine-core utility call IDs instead of modeling the wire field as a plain integer.
Python may encode utility call_id values as MessagePack signed or unsigned integers, including unsigned 64-bit values that do no

vllm.title: mhc_post - remove sts & add vectorized copies

Purpose
This PR implements two small improvements to the mHC post tilelang kernel

The output is currently written to x_shared, then from x_shared to HBM. Given that data is never read from x_shared later on, this write is unnecessary and is removed here.
2. Vectori

vllm.title: elastic_ep: stage/commit MoE quant method on reconfigure
vllm.author: itayalroy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Elastic EP changes the EP/DP topology after the model is already loaded. For
internal modular-kernel MoE methods, prepare_communication_buffer_for_model()
does not rebuild the kernel, so existing ranks keep a modular kernel that was
created for the old EP/DP configuration.
That breaks scale-up in tw

vllm.title: [Attention] Add head_dim=512 support for FlashInfer trtllm attention backend
vllm.author: djmmoss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add 512 to the FlashInfer backend's supported head sizes, enabling models with head_dim=512 attention layers to use the FlashInfer trtllm attention kernels on Blackwell GPUs.
This companion PR enables the head_dim=512 cubin support in FlashInfer: flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#2959

There's a prototype for sharded weight transfer here by @hao-aaron which i

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Auto-raise max_num_batched_tokens for prefix-LM multimodal models
vllm.author: ashwing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes #42687.
Multimodal prefix-LM models (e.g., Gemma 4) that require disable_chunked_mm_input need the entire multimodal item to fit in a single batch. Gemma 4's video budget is 2496 tokens (32 frames × (70 + 2 + 6)), but the auto-calculated max_num_batched_tokens defaults to 2048 on GPUs

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix native Triton top-k/top-p kernel assumes contiguous logi…
vllm.author: zhougit86
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
…ts (#42684)

Purpose
Fixes #42684.
This PR fixes a correctness bug in the native Triton top-k/top-p path when
logits is a non-contiguous [batch, vocab] view.
The original Triton kernel computed each row pointer assuming contiguous
row-major layout:
LOGITS_ROW = LOGITS + row_id * VOCAB_SIZE
This is

as model.language_model.* or language_model.model.*, while vLLM constructs the text model

keep scheduler liveness true while a finished request is waiting on delayed KV connector cleanup
